channel.title: Blog on meorion
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on meorion

item.title: toughtalk
item.description: There are times when some things need to be said. That is the purpose of toughtalk, hashtag-toughtalk.

item.title: Qs and As
item.description: Some questions occurred to me today, and I think we have the answer

item.title: setting up quotes
item.description: I am setting up quotes. I am learning the block quote system for: markdown, org. How it works with Hugo is also related Can images be inside a blockquote? you can bet your bacon, we weren’t ready to find out. - Sir Francis Bacon

item.title: born
item.description: what does she remember? what has she forgotten? fuzz. lint on tongue. sharp angles. mother’s voice, like water on leaves. warmth filling her chest that she just now realized was empty. brushing her hair away from her face and around her ears. Her mother gently lowered her head, so her cheek now lay bare against the clean pillow. she would fall asleep. a face, like her own, looking back at her, eyes wide in a silent scream. she couldn’t hear anything. red ribbons flowing from her hands as mother ate the little girl’s fingers.

item.title: mom
item.description: earlier. we got a message from the others. the reconnaissance team. the strike force. the ones who had their shit together. they left. it crippled joyce. she couldn’t speak. just solid to flickering activity light. then solid, until she disconnected the power and waited a few months. it was the only thing she could think of to reset her. the time she was off was rough. most of the other half of the crew, that hadn’t died, died during this time.

item.title: Sera
item.description: Sera is a little girl who lives aboard a space station. She is one in a line of clones. Where in the line? She doesn’t know. When she was born. A few sleep cycles ago. She decided to keep a journal, so she could remember things more precisely. she thought she had a good memory, but was conflicted that if she didn’t remember she had a bad memory it would make the excercise futile.

item.title: author at file header
item.description:
headings and the like i make stinky my name <br> hah no implied click
Figure 1: Don’t click this image – It’s not a hyperlink thanks for not file header says BigO

item.title: author at subtree level
item.description:
start 1 2 3 4 you can only choose four click
Figure 1: click me. i am norgus

item.title: Post 1
item.description: Export this first post only by bringing point here and doing M-x org-hugo-export-wim-to-md.

item.title: subtree heading is the hugo front-matter title
item.description: EXPORT_DATE is the date that appears on the page heading NOT set to TODO, will set draft = false (i.e. set an item to TODO to mark it as a draft) can use: EXPORT_HUGO_WEIGHT (between colons) getting this information from https://ox-hugo.scripter.co/doc/org-meta-data-to-hugo-front-matter/

item.title: Example block inside quote block
item.description: Some text. Some quoted text. 1 (some-example) Some other text.
